yeshie/site-map/request.description: Published by HEAL agent to trigger site-mapper

schema.correlationId: string (uuid) — used to match site-map/updated response
schema.force: boolean — bypass TTL check if true

yeshie/site-map/failed.description: Published by site-mapper when mapping fails (auth expiry, browser unavailable, etc.)

yeshie/payload/broken.description: Published by relay when a payload step fails after N retries
